additional_notes: Syracuse's 2026 Pro Day was held on Monday, March 16, 2026 at the Ensley Athletic Center (indoors). Nineteen Syracuse football players participated in front of NFL scouts from all 32 teams. Drills offered included the 40-yard dash, short shuttle, three-cone drill, vertical jump, and positional drills. Georgetown transfer QB Danny Lauter threw passes during positional drills. Jack Stonehouse (P) was the only SU player who attended the NFL Combine. Other confirmed participants include: Duce Chestnut (S/CB), Devin Grant (S), Dan Villari (TE), Justus Ross-Simmons (WR), Dion Wilson (DL), Will Nixon (RB), David Reese (EDGE), George Rooks (DL), Denis Jaquez Jr. (EDGE), and Kevin Jobity Jr. (EDGE). Justus Ross-Simmons noted he was disappointed in his 40-yard time but did not specify the number. Stonehouse's punting workout was not visible to media. SPECIFIC NUMERICAL TESTING RESULTS (40 times, measurements, vertical/broad jump, bench, shuttle, cone) HAVE NOT YET BEEN PUBLISHED by any source as of the evening of March 16, 2026. The event concluded only hours ago. The Daily Orange published a feature/interview article at 5:43 PM ET without drill numbers. The 247Sports recap is behind a paywall. Syracuse's official athletics site (cuse.com) has not yet posted results (for reference, in 2025 they posted results the day after pro day on March 17, 2025). This record should be updated once official results are published, likely within 24-48 hours by cuse.com, 247Sports, or other outlets.
